site.name: InBrowser.App
site.description: In-browser utilities that run without a backend server.
site.tagline: A browser-native utility atlas for the Astro rewrite.
site.footerNote: The first three migrated tools now use minimal manifests, localized meta, and self-contained Astro entrypoints.

metadata.homeDescription: The Astro rewrite now ships self-contained multilingual tool pages backed by generated discovery data.
metadata.toolsDescription: Browse the generated tool directory and the rewrite's self-contained tool pattern.

home.title: The rewrite now proves itself with real, self-contained tool pages.
home.description: The first three archetypes are live in the Astro rewrite: a text converter, a validator, and a file-processing tool. Each tool now owns its own Astro entrypoint, localized meta, and internal content structure.
home.toolCountDetail: Real tools currently visible through the generated registry.
home.searchCountDetail: Localized search entries generated from per-tool metadata.
home.principlesTitle: The shell should stay small, and each tool should carry its own weight.
home.principlesDescription: The rewrite now emphasizes generated discovery data at the platform layer and local ownership inside each tool.
home.registryDescription: Routes, search records, and sitemap entries come from minimal manifests plus localized meta instead of hand-maintained wiring.
home.localeDescription: The shell reads `meta/<lang>.json`, while each tool chooses its own `messages/` and `sections/` structure behind `index.astro`.
home.shellDescription: Navigation, language switching, and SEO stay in the site shell. Titles, copy, and long-form composition move back into each tool.
home.contentDescription: The rewrite no longer treats messages, content files, and islands as global contract fields. The shell now discovers tools, then gets out of the way.
home.sidebarDescription: Issue #322 now validates the first archetypes with a smaller contract. The next step is carrying this pattern into more tool families.

tools.title: A generated directory that points to self-contained migrated tools.
tools.description: Search runs against localized tool metadata, while each tool page owns its own Astro composition and any optional client-side interaction.
tools.searchPlaceholder: Search by tool name or description
tools.searchHint: Search uses the active language's localized name and description, and the query stays in the URL.
tools.resultsDescription: The generated index is backed by real tool pages and localized metadata instead of placeholder contracts.
tools.emptyRegistryTitle: No tools have been migrated into this shell yet.
tools.emptyRegistryDescription: As soon as a tool ships a manifest, localized meta, and an `index.astro` entrypoint, it will appear here automatically.
tools.emptySearchTitle: No tools match this query yet.
tools.emptySearchDescription: Try a broader term or clear the search to return to the full generated directory.
tools.contentDescription: The shell only needs the slug, localized meta, and a fixed `index.astro` entrypoint. Messages, sections, and client components stay inside the tool.
tools.sidebarDescription: Search now reflects the smallest useful contract: category, icon, tags, and localized name/description.
